skill.name: graphical-abstract-wizard
skill.description: Generate graphical abstract layout recommendations based on paper abstracts.
skill.summary: Analyzes academic paper abstracts and generates graphical abstract layout recommendations with visual element suggestions, layout blueprints, and AI art prompts.
skill.author: AIPOCH

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 89 potential issues but contextual evaluation confirms the vast majority are false positives. The skill is a local Python script that performs NLP text analysis on paper abstracts and generates formatted output. No network calls, no credential access, no command injection vectors, and no malicious intent were found. All shell backtick patterns are markdown code block documentation. All weak crypto flags are string literals and color codes. The only real risks are standard file write operations to user-specified output paths, which is expected functionality.

low_findings.title: File write to user-specified path
low_findings.description: The script writes output to a file path provided via the --output argument (scripts/main.py:711). This is standard functionality for a tool that generates output files. The path is user-controlled, which is expected and not a vulnerability.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded source repository URL
low_findings.description: SKILL.md:7 contains the GitHub source URL. This is a legitimate documentation link to the skill's repository. No malicious network activity detected.

content.user_title: Generate graphical abstracts from research paper text
content.value_statement: Researchers spend hours designing graphical abstracts for journal submissions. This skill analyzes paper abstracts automatically and generates layout recommendations, visual element suggestions, and ready-to-use AI art prompts for Midjourney and DALL-E.
actual_capabilities: Extracts key concepts, methods, and results from paper abstracts using NLP keyword analysis
Generates layout blueprints with element positioning recommendations using ASCII art grids
Creates Midjourney and DALL-E image prompts tailored to the research topic and style
Produces output in markdown, JSON, or plain text format for flexible integration
Maps scientific terms to visual symbols and color palettes by research domain
Detects research domain (biomedical, computer vision, NLP, robotics, energy, materials)
limitations: Does not generate actual images, only text prompts and layout recommendations
Concept extraction uses simple keyword matching, not deep semantic understanding
AI art prompts may need manual refinement for specific journal requirements
Output quality depends directly on the clarity and completeness of the input abstract

use_cases.title: Journal submission preparation
use_cases.description: A researcher preparing a manuscript for Nature or Science uses this skill to generate a graphical abstract draft that meets journal guidelines.

use_cases.title: Conference poster design
use_cases.description: A graduate student creates a conference poster abstract and needs visual layout ideas and AI art prompts to illustrate their findings.

use_cases.title: Grant proposal visualization
use_cases.description: A principal investigator writes a grant proposal and needs compelling visual summaries of their proposed research approach.

prompt_templates.title: Basic abstract analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the graphical-abstract-wizard skill to analyze this abstract: [paste your paper abstract here]
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick graphical abstract generation from a research paper abstract

prompt_templates.title: With style preference
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the graphical-abstract-wizard skill to analyze this abstract with a [scientific/minimal/colorful/sketch] style: [paste your paper abstract here]
prompt_templates.scenario: Generate a graphical abstract with a specific visual style

prompt_templates.title: JSON output for pipeline integration
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the graphical-abstract-wizard skill to analyze this abstract and return the result in JSON format: [paste your paper abstract here]
prompt_templates.scenario: Integrate graphical abstract output into an automated publishing pipeline

prompt_templates.title: Save output to file
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the graphical-abstract-wizard skill to analyze this abstract and save the output to a file named output.md: [paste your paper abstract here]
prompt_templates.scenario: Generate a graphical abstract and persist the result to disk for later review

output_examples.input: We propose a novel deep learning approach for protein structure prediction that combines transformer architectures with geometric constraints.
output_examples.output:
## Abstract Summary
**Topic**: Biomedical
**Method**: A novel deep learning approach for protein structure prediction that combines transformer architectures with geometric constraints.
**Result**: State-of-the-art accuracy on benchmarks

## Visual Elements
| Element | Symbol | Position | Color |
|---------|--------|----------|-------|
| Neural Network | 🤖 | Center | Blue |
| Protein | 🧬 | Left | Purple |
| Geometric | 📐 | Right | Gold |

## Midjourney Prompt
Scientific graphical abstract, protein structure prediction with neural networks, 3D molecular structures connected by glowing neural network nodes, blue and purple gradient background, clean minimalist style --ar 16:9 --v 6

output_examples.input: We demonstrate a new catalyst for efficient electrochemical water splitting using nanostructured electrodes.
output_examples.output:
## Abstract Summary
**Topic**: Energy
**Method**: A new catalyst for efficient electrochemical water splitting using nanostructured electrodes.
**Result**: Improved efficiency in water splitting

## Visual Elements
| Element | Symbol | Position | Color |
|---------|--------|----------|-------|
| Catalyst | ⚗️ | Center | Red |
| Energy | ⚡ | Left | Orange |
| Efficiency | ⚡ | Right | Pink |

## DALL-E Prompt
A clean, professional scientific illustration for a research paper about energy research and sustainable technology. Show a catalyst material with nanostructured electrodes splitting water molecules into hydrogen and oxygen bubbles.

best_practices: Provide the full abstract text for best results, including methods, results, and conclusions
Review and refine AI art prompts before using them in image generation tools
Use the markdown output format for easy copy-paste into manuscripts and presentations
anti_patterns: Do not use truncated abstracts or single sentences as input, the analysis requires full context
Do not expect the skill to generate actual images, it only produces text recommendations and prompts
Do not rely on concept extraction for tasks requiring precise scientific terminology, verify all outputs manually

faq.question: What input does the graphical abstract wizard need?
faq.answer: It needs the full text of a research paper abstract. You can provide it directly as text or from a file.

faq.question: Does this skill generate actual images?
faq.answer: No. It generates layout recommendations, visual element suggestions, and AI art prompts. You need a separate image generation tool to create the actual graphic.

faq.question: What output formats are available?
faq.answer: The skill supports markdown, JSON, and plain text output formats. Markdown is the default.

faq.question: Does this skill make network calls to external services?
faq.answer: No. All analysis is performed locally using keyword matching and text processing. No data is sent to external servers.

faq.question: Can I customize the visual style of the output?
faq.answer: Yes. You can choose from four styles: scientific, minimal, colorful, and sketch. The default is scientific.

faq.question: Which AI art tools are the prompts optimized for?
faq.answer: The skill generates prompts optimized for Midjourney v6 and DALL-E 3. You can adapt them for other image generation tools.
